title: Short human-readable title
notes: Where this case came from, what it stresses, any caveats.
manuscript: Paste the manuscript section here, with citation markers exactly as the author wrote them.

goldClaims.originalText: claim sentence WITH its citation marker, e.g. ...placebo.1,2
goldClaims.text: claim sentence WITHOUT citation markers (clean form used for verification)

goldNonClaims: Sentences a reviewer should NOT extract (background, aims, transitions). Used for precision.

1.name: First-author Year
1.text: Optional: reference text/snippet. Needed only for online verdict accuracy.

goldVerdicts.rationale: one line citing the LABELING-GUIDE.md rule that fixes this verdict
